nasb.text: He gave also their crops to the grasshopper And the product of their labor to the locust.

esv.text: He gave their crops to the destroying locust and the fruit of their labor to the locust.

cnv.text: 他把他們的農產交給蚱蜢， 把他們辛勞的收穫交給蝗蟲。

ccb.text: 祂将他们的五谷赏给蚱蜢， 让蝗虫吃尽他们的收成。

csbs.text: 他把他们的收成交给蚂蚱， 把他们的辛苦所得交给蝗虫。
